name: Fattening Simulator
description:
get fatter get fatter get fatter you're basically a milkshake tester and are constantly gulping down addictive cream until you get fat kinda boring? not really sure what to make it do to spice stuff up; if you want, you can try masturbating or try to get it to stop before you're immobilized or something
contains (extreme) weight gain, fatfur ^^
